signals.headline: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ethereum is up ~4% today to $2,403.78 (from $2,305 yesterday), tracking Bitcoin's 2.2% rise to $78,194 amid the confirmed ceasefire extension that removed Strait of Hormuz geopolitical risk, triggering $1.4B crypto fund inflows led by BTC/ETH products and MicroStrategy's $2.54B BTC buy (34,164 coins, largest since Nov 2024).[1][
matched_markets: Will Trump agree to Iranian enrichment of uranium in April?
Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of April?
